cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out when David could have gone to the football field. The question says that David went there today, and we need to determine between which times that could have happened based on the clues provided. Let me break down the information step by step. First, let me list out all the known activities and their time frames: 1. David woke up at 5am. That's a starting point, but waking up doesn't necessarily mean he was active immediately. So he's probably not doing anything significant before that. 2. Steven saw David buying a phone at the electronics store from 5am to 6am. So from 5 to 6 am, David was at the electronics store. That means he couldn't be at the football field during that hour because he was somewhere else. 3. Kimberly saw David taking photos near the Leaning Tower of Pisa from 6am to 8am. So between 6 and 8 am, David was in Pisa, taking photos. That's another time he's occupied and thus can't be at the football field. 4. Betty saw David working out at the gym from 9am to 12pm. So from 9 to 12, he's at the gym. No football field time there. 5. Lisa saw David driving to the water park from 12pm to 3pm. So between 12 and 3 pm, he's on his way to the water park. Not at the football field during that window. 6. William saw David sitting on a rooftop from 3pm to 10pm. That's a long stretch. From 3 to 10 pm, he's at the rooftop. Again, not at the football field during that time. Additionally, it's mentioned that the football field was closed after 10pm. So even if David had gone later than 10pm, he couldn't have because it's closed. So the latest he could have gone is before 10pm. Now, let's look at the timeline and see when David was unaccounted for. Starting from when he woke up at 5am: - 5am to 6am: Electronics store (Steven) - 6am to 8am: Leaning Tower of Pisa (Kimberly) - 8am to 9am: No reported activity - 9am to 12pm: Gym (Betty) - 12pm to 3pm: Driving to the water park (Lisa) - 3pm to 10pm: Sitting on a rooftop (William) So the only time window where David isn't accounted for is between 8am and 9am. That's the only period between waking up and the subsequent activities where there's no reported sighting of him. Therefore, the only possible time when he could have gone to the football field is during that hour. Let's also check the options provided: (A) 6am to 8am – David was in Pisa, so no. (B) 5am to 6am – He was at the electronics store with Steven, so no. (C) 3pm to 10pm –
